name: file_write
description: Write text content to a file in the allowed data directory. The path is sandboxed to FILE_READ_BASE_DIR — path traversal is blocked. By default refuses to overwrite existing files. Use for saving final text outputs, notes, or intermediate artefacts.

path.description: Relative path of the file to write within the allowed data directory.

content.description: Text content to write to the file (UTF-8).

overwrite.description: Allow overwriting an existing file. Defaults to false — fails if file exists.

path.description: Relative path of the written file.
